refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns the 2D perimeter of a polygonal geometry. Alias for ST_Perimeter.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the 2-dimensional perimeter of a polygonal geometry.

note.para: This is currently an alias for ST_Perimeter. In future versions ST_Perimeter may return the highest dimension perimeter for a geometry. This is still under consideration
